name: boar
description: A bristle-backed boar the size of a motorcycle, scarred and mud-caked. Its tusks are yellowed and chipped from rooting through volcanic rock. It watches you with small, furious eyes.

name: large-tailed monitor
shortDescription: a large-tailed lizard with black-green coloring and a hyperactive forked tongue
description: A large-tailed lizard bounds about, sniffing the air for opportune food. Parker's monitors are notoriously short-sighted.

name: Littleman shadow
description: A shadow shaped roughly like a small person, but wrong — the proportions shift when you're not looking directly at it. It moves in quick, angular jerks, as if animated frame by frame. Where it touches the ground, the surface darkens.

name: Bigman shadow
description: A shadow the size and shape of a large man, but stretched at the edges, trailing wisps of darkness like smoke. It moves with terrible patience. Its outline flickers — sometimes it has arms, sometimes more.

name: Gaspar
shortDescription: a fruit vendor with a wide smile
description: A wiry man in a tank top sitting behind a wooden crate piled with tropical fruit. He fans himself with a folded newspaper and greets everyone like a cousin.

name: Brandreth
description: A tall man with a broad, silvery face and an immaculate white shirt, polishing the same glass he was polishing an hour ago. He moves with the unhurried precision of someone who has been tending bar since before you were born.

name: Peter Hoffs
shortDescription: an old man in a courduroy blazer
description: A late-middle-aged man. He has a white hair describable as a 'shock'. He wears a corduroy blazer and a Tyrolean hat with two pins.

chitchat_1.args: It's quite good actually, because Spirit Island is quite cheap to live, compared to tax almost anywhere else in the region.

chitchat_2.args: It's good to know that there are places in the Pacific where you still pay in pounds.

chitchat_3.args: Well, in point of fact I am, erm, shall we say encouraging input from professions. If some, er, brilliant writers were to WORK on my memoirs, to actually write them with me. Some fantastic young female up-and-comer, if I'm honest. I would of course PAY you for that. It's far less than creative talent deserves— all creative talent! And I realize that, but it does buy quite a lot at Tesco, and perhaps in the grand scheme, that's the more important thing, so...

chitchat_4.args: Well, it's not quite Forest Road British Lager's on tap, heh. Of course it's not meant to be. This is certainly not— that sort of place. No... this is the sort of place where you want to HAVE FUN!

chitchat_5.args: The surroundings are truly beautiful. And the Padrigans are a lovely people, of course, very welcoming. You'll see that.

chitchat_6.args: glances around himself at the faces of the others. He glances at the door to the hotel lobby.

name: Lizzy
description: A thirtyish white woman in a floral tank and capri shorts, standing behind a folding table with a sun-bleached banner reading 'SPIRIT ISLAND EXPERIENCES.' Her smile never wavers. Her eyes are tired.

name: Baltasar
shortDescription: a guard leaning against a wall
description: A stocky man in a faded security uniform, badge half-peeled off. He is the last remaining employee of the shuttered Lovesea resort.

name: Margarida
shortDescription: a shopkeeper surrounded by tourist junk
description: An older woman in a muumuu sits in a folding chair behind a card table stacked with shell necklaces, postcards, and — buried among the junk — some things that might actually be useful. She sizes you up before quoting a price.

name: DQ Cashier
description: A teenager in a Dairy Queen visor, leaning on the register. She looks through you with a thousand-yard stare.

name: Gabriela
shortDescription: a clerk in a green apron
description: A teenage girl in a forest-green apron with a bear logo, restocking shelves with the calm focus of someone who is mentally somewhere else.

name: Riggs
shortDescription: a bartender who speaks in enigmatic statements about blood and insects
description: A lean figure behind a plywood bar, face half-lit by the jukebox glow.

name: Linus
shortDescription: an older Black man in a pressed shirt and collar
description: A Black man in his sixties, dressed up conservatively.

linus_weathers1.args: watches the dingy television in the corner of the bar, unblinking.

linus_weathers2.args: The Mavericks do not have coaching. They do not.

linus_weathers3.args: sips his beer, watching the TV. He seems on-edge.

name: Tomé
shortDescription: a wiry boy in cutoff shorts
description: A teenager in cutoff shorts and flip-flops, Kai's nephew or cousin or something. He runs pineapples from the wild patch to Kai's crate with the grim efficiency of someone who has been doing this chore since he could walk.

head_out_emote.args: stretches, cracks his knuckles, and heads for the pineapple patch.

arrive_patch_emote.args: kneels among the pineapple plants and starts twisting one free.

got_it_emote.args: tucks the pineapple under his arm and heads back.

deliver_emote.args: sets the pineapple on Kai's crate and wipes his hands on his shorts.

name: Fireflies
description: A shimmer in the air, like heat haze with intention.

visible_1.args: hovers in place, edges rippling like a reflection on water.

fade_out_1.args: flickers violently, then fades to almost nothing.

fade_in_2.args: materializes from nothing, edges crackling with faint light.

visible_2.args: drifts slowly, turning as if listening to something inaudible.

fade_out_2.args: thins to a thread of light, then vanishes entirely.

fade_in_3.args: snaps into existence mid-stride, as if arriving from very far away.

visible_3.args: stands perfectly still among the ruins, light crawling across its outline.

fade_out_3.args: comes apart like smoke in a sudden wind. Gone.

fade_in_4.args: reassembles in the glade, piece by piece, like a puzzle solving itself.

visible_4.args: kneels at the flat stone, flickering. It might be praying. It might be dying.

fade_out_4.args: gutters like a candle and goes out.

fade_in_1.args: blinks into the thicket like a channel changing. It's back.

name: Bearman
shortDescription: a fat man in a hoodie
description: A heavy man in a stained grey hoodie, hood up, hands in pockets. He walks, stands, ponders, walks back, locomoting up and down the frontage road to a stretch of dusty fields.

mutter_2.args: What I will say is this: I no longer consider myself, in any way, countercultural.

mutter_3.args: The conclusion is around here somewhere, to the whole entire universe. These people are all in on it somehow.

emote_1.args: stops and stares at his hands for a long moment.

mutter_4.args: ...four equilateral sides, but only two of them are real... You must keep in mind the allure of the unreal, Arthur.

mutter_5.args: But there has to be another one, that is the thing we know for certain... mathematically, it's around here...

emote_2.args: pulls his hood tighter and turns around.

mutter_7.args: ...it's not symmetry if it only works in one direction, that's just chirality...

emote_3.args: hunches his shoulders against a wind that isn't blowing.
